current_conditions.site_name: ETOWAH RIVER AT GA 9, NEAR DAWSONVILLE, GA

water_temp_read.read: Water is very warm for trout.

light_pressure_read.read: Light and pressure do not strongly push the outlook either way.

stocking_read.read: Recent stocking supports eggs, worms, and attractor nymphs.

angler_analysis.expected_trout_behavior: Expect trout to favor the most comfortable feeding lanes while staying close to cover when light is high.
angler_analysis.presentation_style: Prioritize clean drifts, smaller natural patterns, and stocked-trout attractors where appropriate.

fly_reasoning.egg_pattern: Recent stocking makes eggs a logical confidence fly.
fly_reasoning.squirmy_worm: A simple stocked-trout attractor and good dirty-water option.
fly_reasoning.duracell: A strong attractor nymph when fish will move a little but are not fully aggressive.

caution_notes: Warm water may increase trout stress.

generated_text.quick_read: Trout fishing on the Etowah River is tough due to very warm water with a temperature of 80.2°F. Recent stocking supports good action with egg patterns and attractor nymphs despite challenging conditions.
generated_text.best_window: The best fishing window is day 2 morning because cooler air temperatures and moderate sky cover provide more comfortable conditions that may encourage trout to feed near stocked areas.
generated_text.current_conditions: Water temperature is very warm at 80.2°F with a flow of 96.5 cfs and gage height of 3.68 ft. Turbidity is moderate at 6.4 NTU.
generated_text.weather_setup: Sky cover is light averaging 20%, pressure is steady at 30.05 inHg with no clear trend, wind from the west at 4.8 mph average with gusts up to 16.1 mph, and no rain expected.
generated_text.what_this_means: Trout will seek cold-water refuges and oxygenated pockets, staying close to runs, seams, and structure. Use clean drifts with smaller natural patterns and stocked-trout attractors like egg patterns, squirmy worms, and duracell nymphs. Caution: warm water increases trout stress, so consider limited targeting.
